mapper.sql: user_id, nick_name, email, password, avatar, sex, birthday, school, person_introduction, join_time, last_login_time, last_login_ip, status, notice_info, total_coin_count, current_coin_count, theme
mapper.update: UPDATE mvp_user_info SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE mvp_user_info SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE email = #{email}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM mvp_user_info WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM mvp_user_info WHERE email = #{email} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM mvp_user_info WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY join_time DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO mvp_user_info ( user_id, nick_name, email, password, avatar, sex, birthday, school, person_introduction, join_time, last_login_time, last_login_ip, status, notice_info, total_coin_count, current_coin_count, theme ) VALUES
( #{item.userId}, #{item.nickName}, #{item.email}, #{item.password}, #{item.avatar}, #{item.sex}, #{item.birthday}, #{item.school}, #{item.personIntroduction}, #{item.joinTime}, #{item.lastLoginTime}, #{item.lastLoginIp}, #{item.status}, #{item.noticeInfo}, #{item.coinCount}, #{item.currentCoinCount}, #{item.theme} )
mapper.update: UPDATE mvp_user_info SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE nick_name = #{nickName}
mapper.delete:
UPDATE mvp_user_info SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE user_id IN
#{userId}

where.if: AND (nick_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR school LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%'))
